title: Concurrent refresh
description: Given files changing on disk while queries are in flight, readers should get either the old state or the new state, never a mix. JIT refresh + concurrent reads must be safe. Spec: features/concurrency/concurrent_refresh.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: in_progress. Done: moved to concurrent refresh story and reviewing feature spec. Next: implement Rust/Python steps for concurrent_refresh.feature and validate refresh consistency. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: in_progress. Done: implemented concurrent_refresh steps in Rust+Python with file fixtures, refresh/reader concurrency, and warm() checks; cargo test --test cucumber passed; behave concurrent_refresh.feature passed. Next: close story and commit/push. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: closed (kbs does not accept 'done'). Done: added Rust+Python concurrent_refresh steps with file-backed fixtures, refresh/reader concurrency, and warm() consistency checks. Tests: cargo test --test cucumber passed; behave features/concurrency/concurrent_refresh.feature passed.
